long_description:
For DAL FAAS, it is observed that there are incorrect hw_filter rules present which needs to be cleared off. This is captured by running a script.
Incident source: FAB-26268 - Saravanan Velayutham
short_description: Need to delete incorrect hw_filters for Faas
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Need to delete incorrect hw_filters for Faas
SME Findings: sme-team: SME Findings
Reason of Escalation:
Resolution Steps: Steps has been executed as mentioned in the description where incorrect hw_filter rules has been cleared from respective nodes. SDN team were on the call and they have validated and everything looks good and hence resolving the incident.
Signature of Issue:
Jira/Github/Other Tickets:
Category/Subcategory: Node | interface/link down
Timeline Summary:
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
current_status_next_steps:
Node 1=======> dal1-qz1-sr2-rk104-s28: Exp_snat_ip: 21.0.186.1


Step1: gt dal1-qz1-sr2-rk104-s28
Step2: /usr/local/fabcon/utils/show_filters -i p3v14_r  => Getting filters Before deletion
            /usr/local/fabcon/utils/show_filters -i vxlan1
Step3: Delete wrong hw_filter >> execute as sudo user
            	tc filter del dev p3v14_r chain 0 pref 1 handle 0x432 parent ffff: flower
